name: claude-code-config
description: Battle-tested configuration system for Claude Code agents: 23 architectural principles, 14 safety hooks, 22 skills (incl. pixel-art-studio + pixel-art-storyboard with retouch-style standardization, 10 Design Seeds curated palettes with tag/mood search, animation baking via playwright+ffmpeg to GIF/WebM-alpha/MP4/animated-WebP, Tier 1/2/3 detail tier system with high-detail-pipeline doc covering AI-base+canvas-overlay workflow), 5 pixel-art quality agents (style/animation/composition/interaction/quality-board orchestrator), 15 alternative comparisons, 8 templates, diagnostic scripts. Pairs with mclaude for multi-session coordination.
